overall.description: Maritime simulation game footage showing a first-person view from a ship's bridge navigating into a harbor at night during stormy weather. The vessel moves steadily through the water toward dock structures, with navigation displays visible and a port arrival notification appearing mid-sequence.

events.description: lightning strike flashes on the right side of the harbor, briefly illuminating the water

agents.ego_description: piloting the ship through the harbor channel using the navigation displays and radar

entered.detail: left screen showing nautical chart with ship position and route
center circular radar screen showing surrounding terrain and navigation channel
right screen showing depth readings and underwater terrain profile
front deck of the vessel visible through the bridge windows with railings and anchor equipment
dark water surface reflecting distant lights as the ship moves forward
twinkling lights from coastal buildings visible on the horizon
large industrial cargo cranes silhouetted against the night sky on the right shoreline

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view from a ship's bridge navigating through a harbor channel at night. Three navigation displays are visible at the top of the frame showing charts, radar, and depth data. The ship moves steadily forward through dark water toward distant city lights, with industrial port cranes becoming visible on the right shoreline. A lightning strike briefly illuminates the scene at around 2 seconds.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge approaching dock for mooring

events.description: port arrival notification 'Северный порт' appears as a UI popup in the center of the screen
port arrival notification popup disappears from the screen

agents.ego_description: continuing the approach to the dock for mooring operations

entered.detail: concrete dock structure with lighting becoming visible directly ahead as the ship approaches
large white spherical industrial storage tanks visible on the right shoreline

segments.scene_description: The ship continues its approach toward the dock, with the port arrival notification 'Северный порт' briefly appearing and disappearing. The dock pier becomes visible directly ahead while the port cranes and distant city lights pass out of view behind the ship. Large white spherical storage tanks become visible on the right shoreline as the vessel nears its mooring position.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a ship's bridge as it navigates a dark harbor channel toward a final mooring position. It begins with the vessel moving through dark water under the glow of navigation displays, heading toward distant city lights while industrial port cranes emerge on the right shoreline. As a sudden lightning strike briefly illuminates the stormy night, the ship continues its approach and a port arrival notification for Северный порт appears and vanishes from view. The scene then shifts as the distant city lights and cranes recede behind the vessel, bringing a concrete dock pier into direct focus ahead. Finally, the camera glides closer to the mooring position as large white spherical storage tanks come into view along the right shoreline.
